description: Triggered when the user wants to set up a database, configure Prisma or Drizzle ORM, write migrations, seed data, or implement patterns like connection pooling and soft deletes.
should_trigger: Set up Prisma ORM with PostgreSQL for my Next.js app
Create a Prisma schema with User, Post, and Category models
How do I run database migrations in production with Prisma?
Set up connection pooling with PgBouncer for serverless deployment
Create a database seeding script with sample data
Implement soft deletes with Prisma middleware
Set up Drizzle ORM as a lightweight alternative to Prisma
should_not_trigger: Set up MongoDB with Payload CMS for multi-tenant architecture
Create a REST API with Express.js and raw SQL
How do I set up Redis caching for my Next.js app?
Configure authentication with sessions in the database
